extra_commands: curl -s https://qrbanner.com/sitemap.xml | grep -oE '/templates/[a-z0-9-]+' | sort -u > /tmp/tpl_urls.txt; TOTAL=$(wc -l < /tmp/tpl_urls.txt); FAIL=0; while read -r path; do code=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "http://127.0.0.1:3000$path"); if [ "$code" != "200" ]; then echo "FAIL $path $code"; FAIL=$((FAIL+1)); fi; done < /tmp/tpl_urls.txt; echo "CHECKED $TOTAL TEMPLATE PAGES"; [ $FAIL -eq 0 ] && echo ALL_TEMPLATE_PAGES_OK || echo "FAILURES $FAIL"; rm -f /tmp/tpl_urls.txt
